message.content:
@startuml
participant Actor as Actor
participant AuthController as AuthController
participant JwtTokenProvider as JwtTokenProvider
participant JwtAuthenticationResponse as JwtAuthenticationResponse

Actor -> AuthController : authenticateUser
AuthController -> JwtTokenProvider : generateToken
JwtTokenProvider -> AuthController : new
AuthController -> JwtAuthenticationResponse : new
JwtAuthenticationResponse -> AuthController : new
AuthController -> Actor : new

@enduml
